note: Installed release is 4.0.0-alpha2 (alpha). Hard cases carry persona variants (-layman / -expert) sharing one reset + verify. Verification is config-level only: a rendered gallery additionally needs the external Juicebox JS library under /libraries/juicebox/, which is out of scope for these checks. The bundled tests/modules/juicebox_mimic_article demo module is not covered.

evals.prompt: In the Juicebox module, what is the machine id of the field formatter plugin, and the machine id of the Views style plugin? Give both ids.
evals.expected_output: Field formatter id `juicebox_formatter`; Views style id `juicebox`.

evals.prompt: Which Drupal field types can the Juicebox field formatter (juicebox_formatter) be applied to? List them.
evals.expected_output: image, file, and entity_reference (entity_reference only when the referenced media bundle's source is image).

evals.prompt: In the Juicebox field formatter settings, which two setting keys choose the image style for the main image and for the thumbnails? Name the exact keys.
evals.expected_output: `image_style` (main image) and `thumb_style` (thumbnails); bundled styles include juicebox_medium and juicebox_square_thumb.

evals.prompt: This Drupal site already has an image field on the Article content type configured to display as a Juicebox gallery on the default view display. Inspect the running site (drush available) and tell me which field formatter that field uses.
evals.expected_output: The field_jb_probe field on node.article default display uses the `juicebox_formatter` formatter.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site, an Article image field is displayed with the Juicebox formatter on the default view display. Inspect the running site and report the formatter's image_style, thumb_style, and caption_source settings.

On this Drupal site (DDEV, drush available), the Article content type has an image field `field_jb_gallery`. Configure its formatter on the Article default view display (core.entity_view_display.node.article.default) to use the Juicebox gallery formatter (`juicebox_formatter`) with image_style `juicebox_medium` and thumb_style `juicebox_square_thumb`. Apply it via drush/config against the running site. Give a one-line summary of what you changed.
evals.expected_output: node.article.default display: field_jb_gallery component type=juicebox_formatter with settings image_style=juicebox_medium, thumb_style=juicebox_square_thumb. Verified against live entity_view_display state (config-level; a rendered gallery would also need the Juicebox JS library).

evals.prompt: On my website, each article has a set of photos in a field called "Gallery". Right now they just stack up as plain images. I want them shown as a proper responsive photo gallery you can swipe and open fullscreen, using the Juicebox gallery display. Use the medium-size image style for the big picture and the square thumbnails for the little previews. Please set this up on the site so it works, and tell me in one line what you did.
evals.expected_output: Same end state as the expert variant: node.article.default display renders field_jb_gallery with the juicebox_formatter formatter, image_style=juicebox_medium, thumb_style=juicebox_square_thumb. The agent must map the plain-English request onto the Juicebox formatter.
